notes: Step complete: POST .../steps/{n}/complete with body {"step_name": "..."} only (not wrapped in json_payload).
Document upload: multipart form-data fields doc_type + file (no JSON body).
Submit: POST .../submit with {"expiry_date": "YYYY-MM-DD"} — FIRS renewal requires expiry_date.
BPP Federal/State use /api/v1/bpp/* routes (not workflow). Upload is blocked until FIRS, PENCOM, ITF, NSITF renewals are completed.
Each section endpoints[] must be run top-to-bottom within that section.
Sections must be run in section_id order unless you already completed prerequisites.
Request body for JSON endpoints is json_payload (send as raw JSON, not wrapped).
recommended_section_order: 03 FIRS / NEW — FIRS — New Registration (TIN Setup)
07 FIRS / RENEWAL — FIRS — Renewal (Tax Compliance / TCC)
11 CAC / RENEWAL — CAC — Annual Returns (Yearly Renewal)
12 GROUP_LIFE_INSURANCE / NEW — Group Life Insurance — New Registration
13 GROUP_LIFE_INSURANCE / RENEWAL — Group Life Insurance — Renewal
16 BPP_STATE — State BPP — State Procurement Registration
